exercises.name: Assisted Prone Hamstring
instructions: Prepare the equipment and adopt the starting position.
Pre-engage the hamstrings before initiating the movement.
Perform the movement in a controlled manner, keeping good form.
Return to the starting position controlling the eccentric phase.
Breathe: exhale on effort, inhale on the way back.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lying Femoral
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand (or the indicated one) with an appropriate weight.
Pre-engage the hamstrings before initiating the movement.

exercises.name: Exercise Ball Seated Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Prepare the equipment and adopt the starting position.
Move into the hamstrings stretch position.
Hold for 20 to 40 seconds breathing deeply.
Return slowly to the starting position and repeat if desired.
